moments.title: The Open Championship Underway
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, is underway at Royal Birkdale, with the final round set for Sunday.

angles.name: Prestige & History
angles.copy: The Open Championship is happening right now! Golf's most historic major unfolds at Royal Birkdale, with the Claret Jug on the line this weekend.

angles.name: Weekend Climax
angles.copy: Who will be crowned Champion Golfer of the Year? The Open Championship culminates on Sunday. Tune in for all the drama from Royal Birkdale.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates this Sunday, July 19th, with Spain facing Argentina in the highly anticipated final in New Jersey.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The FIFA World Cup Final is just days away. Will Spain or Argentina lift the trophy on Sunday?

angles.name: National Buzz
angles.copy: Football fever is peaking! Even though it's not our boys, the World Cup Final on Sunday is going to be HUGE. Where will you be watching?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23rd-26th, promising a weekend packed with music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival kicks off next Thursday, bringing an incredible lineup of music, comedy, and more to Henham Park. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Music & Arts Weekend
angles.copy: Beyond the headliners, Latitude is a feast for the senses! Comedy, theatre, and discovery await from July 23rd.

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Tomorrow
moments.blurb: The UK's Official Singles Chart is updated every Friday, revealing the new number one and biggest tracks of the week.

angles.name: Chart Anticipation
angles.copy: Who's going to hit number one? The brand new Official UK Singles Chart is announced tomorrow! Any predictions for the top spot?

angles.name: Current Chart Buzz
angles.copy: We're counting down the hours until the new chart! What tracks are you hoping to see climb or debut on tomorrow's Official Singles Chart?

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen legend and iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! The Queen guitar wizard has given us some of rock's most unforgettable riffs. What's your favourite May solo?

angles.name: Queen's Sound
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', Brian May's guitar is unmistakable. Celebrating his 79th birthday this Sunday!

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Rock and Latin music fusion pioneer Carlos Santana turns 79 on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana this Monday! His guitar has blessed us with countless timeless tracks and incredible live performances.

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: From Woodstock to 'Smooth', Carlos Santana's sound is truly iconic. Wishing him a very happy 79th birthday on Monday!

moments.title: Cat Stevens' 78th Birthday
moments.blurb: Influential British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, will be 78 on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the incredible Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) this Tuesday! His thoughtful lyrics and beautiful melodies continue to resonate.

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son', Cat Stevens has given us so many classic songs. Wishing him a very happy 78th birthday!

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Don Henley this Wednesday! Whether with the Eagles or solo, his voice is simply unforgettable.

angles.name: Classic Rock Voice
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', Don Henley's impact on rock is immense. Celebrating his 79th birthday next week!

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic top-hatted guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) turns 61 this Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Rock God
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary Slash! The GNR guitar god has delivered some of the most recognisable riffs in rock history. What's your favourite?

angles.name: GNR Anthems
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain', Slash's guitar work defined a generation. Celebrating his 61st birthday this Thursday!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar, singer, actress, and dancer Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday this Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: Pop Diva
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Friday! A true icon of music, film, and dance. What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Multi-talented Icon
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to Hollywood blockbusters, Jennifer Lopez is a force of nature. Wishing her a fabulous 57th birthday on Friday!

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83 this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! The Rolling Stones frontman is still rocking stages and defying expectations. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Stones Legacy
angles.copy: 83 years young! Mick Jagger, the voice and energy behind The Rolling Stones, celebrates his birthday this Sunday. A true legend of rock and roll.

moments.title: Roger Taylor's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen's powerhouse drummer and songwriter Roger Taylor celebrates his 77th birthday this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the incredible Roger Taylor! The man who laid down the beat for Queen's greatest anthems. What's your favourite Roger Taylor moment?

angles.name: Queen's Rhythm
angles.copy: Beyond the drums, Roger Taylor also penned some fantastic Queen songs. Celebrating his 77th birthday this Sunday!
